name: ComponentName
description: One-sentence description of what this component does. Built on Base UI X with StyleX styling.
category: actions | layout | forms | feedback | navigation | data-display

disabled.description: Disables the component. Uses muted color tokens (no opacity).

dataAttributes.data-disabled: Present when the component is disabled.

Root.focusRing: Applied via focusRing from @basex-ui/styles. Renders 2px solid outline on :focus-visible.

conventions.focusRing: Every interactive element (button, input, trigger) must apply focusRing from @basex-ui/styles.
conventions.disabledState: Use muted color tokens (colorTextMuted, colorBorderMuted) instead of opacity for contrast-safe disabled states.
conventions.ariaLabels: Icon-only buttons must have aria-label (e.g. aria-label="Close" on close buttons).

intents.reasoning: Why this component is the right choice for this intent.

avoidWhen.reasoning: Why this component is wrong here.
